meta.label: quantity
meta.content: Atomic amount + unit. Use whenever a count, mass, volume, or duration belongs to an entity (e.g. cargo of 42 pallets, 800 gallons of diesel, 3 fishing boats).

unit.description: Unit of measure (pallets, tons, gallons, m, kg, count, ...)

min.description: Lower bound when the quantity is a range

max.description: Upper bound when the quantity is a range

_provenance.rationale: Extracted from old `physical.quantity` and `cargo.quantity` so any entity can carry a typed amount.
